goal: Orchestrate full fixture-validation package: reach table, clearance verdicts, workspace envelope, mass, vendor USD export.
thoughts: Multi-step design-review package. Keep confidence honest at each step. Lisa won't sign off on 'looks fine'. Per-position screenshot + number + pass/fail is the deliverable format. Density varies by material -- take her numbers, do not guess. Headless overnight is realistic for the 6-position clearance sweeps.
code:
targets = ["<T1>", "<T2>", "<T3>", "<T4>", "<T5>", "<T6>"]
SPEC_MM = 2.0
rows = []
for idx, tgt in enumerate(targets):
    ik = solve_ik(articulation_path="/World/UR10e", target_pose=tgt)
    clr = check_path_clearance(
        prim_path="/World/UR10e/Flange/EOAT",
        waypoints=["<APPROACH>", tgt, "<RETRACT>"],
        others=["/World/Fixture"], units="mm"
    )
    verdict = "PASS" if clr.min_distance_mm >= SPEC_MM else "FAIL"
    capture_viewport(path=f"<DIR>/pos_{idx}.png", width=2048, height=2048)
    rows.append({"pos": idx, "reach": ik.success,
                 "min_clearance_mm": clr.min_distance_mm, "verdict": verdict})
env = show_workspace(articulation_path="/World/UR10e", include_end_effector=True, mode="swept_volume")
env_bbox = get_bounding_box(prim_path=env.prim_path, units="mm")
vol = compute_volume(prim_path="/World/Fixture", units="m^3")
mass_kg = vol.value * "<DENSITY_KG_PER_M3>"
export_scene_package(
    output_path="<OUT>/fixture_for_vendor.usdz",
    scope_paths=["/World/Fixture"],
    flatten_references=True, vendor_nucleus_assets=True,
    preserve_metersPerUnit=True
)
failure_modes: Guessing material density instead of taking her numbers
Declaring 'PASS' on a position without the per-position screenshot + number
Running interactively when headless overnight is cleaner for 6 sweeps
